suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that bug-fix verification should include tests that execute the modified failure/success branches (or explicitly document why branch-level tests are not feasible) rather than only direct state toggles.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-swap-drain-cleanup review passed but flagged that test_swap_drain_flag_cleared_on_failure directly toggles draining state instead of exercising post_swap() failure branches in routes.rs.

rejectedObservations.observation: Swap-drain guidance/tests emphasize success-path behavior but do not explicitly require cleanup assertions on swap failure paths.
